# MuleSoft Gmail Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Gmail Connector documentation.
> See [Gmail Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gmail-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Gmail Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Gmail Connector 1.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gmail-connector/latest/gmail-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Gmail Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gmail-connector/latest/gmail-connector-studio.md)
- [Gmail Connector 1.1 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gmail-connector/latest/gmail-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Gmail Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gmail-connector/latest/index.md)
